mini_task_spec: Using the `filesearch` brick's `search` tool, find all Go (`.go`) files under the directory `test-repo/pkg/kubelet/cm` (search recursively) that contain the regex pattern `// TODO\(` (a Go-style attributed TODO comment). Report the matching file paths, one per line, sorted alphabetically. Do not include any other output — just the sorted list of relative file paths (relative to `test-repo/`). Use glob filter `*.go` and the path `test-repo/pkg/kubelet/cm`.
